# Contributed baselines

Anonymized or attributed baselines submitted by community operators via the [baseline_submission issue template](../../.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/baseline_submission.md).

> The N=1 → N=3 path: this is where the catalog earns its claim to generality.

## Submitted

(empty — be the first via [Issues → Baseline submission](https://github.com/epoko77-ai/tokensave/issues/new?template=baseline_submission.md))

## Aggregated view (auto-generated when N≥3)

Once three or more baselines are accepted, the README "Real-world baseline" table will reference the aggregated median ± range instead of the one-operator catalog alone.

## What gets accepted

- Numbers verifiable from a paste of `audit.py` output
- Operator setup description (number of harnesses, primary use case)
- Permission boundary (anonymous aggregation vs attributed credit vs private discussion)

## What does not change a baseline submission's acceptance

- The numbers themselves — including ones that contradict the N=1 reference. Disagreement is the most valuable signal.
- Whether the operator is on Claude Code vs another harness — note framework + adapter availability separately.
